final:
module RefModule (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // toggle Q
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
